title: Assistant Associate - Intern
description:
Background

XNode is the leading open innovation platform in the Asia-Pacific region, dedicated to promoting global technology entrepreneurship and industrial upgrading. XNode supports venture building, industry acceleration and provides cross-border landing services. In cooperation with more than 500 multinational corporations, VCs, governments and organizations, XNode provides full-cycle support for startups from product iteration to global expansion, and has helped more than 400 technology companies achieve cross-border landing and industrial breakthroughs. As active participant in the innovation ecosystem, XNode continues to empower local innovation forces to go global, while attracting international high-quality resources to land in APAC, contributing to the creation of a science and technology innovation center with global influence.

Responsibilities

● Participate in desk and marketing research to support the acceleration team in startup recruitment and selection

● Assist in preparing reports; create and maintain PowerPoint presentations for pitches or roadshows

● Research and gather documentation on competitive analysis

● Familiar with various CMS and update website content and respond to inbound queries

● Daily administration work and assistance for the department

● Perform clerical duties, take memos, meeting minutes, maintain files, and organize documents, as needed

● Manage databases, input information, data, and records

● Work with offshore team to update and maintain the content hub regularly

● Support with organization, maintenance and updates on department calendars

● Any other tasks assigned by Manager

Personal Attributes

● Proficient computer skills, including Microsoft Office Suite (Word, PowerPoint, and Excel)

● Undergraduate students in Year 3/4 of a Bachelor’s degree program or Postgraduate students are preferred

● Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English; fluent Chinese is a plus

● Self-motivated and able to independently execute and complete tasks

● Sharp, energetic and eager to tackle new projects and ideas

● Has a strong sense of responsibility and ownership

If you are interested in this position, pls. send your CV to hr@thexnode.com

postedCompany.description:
XNode empowers international startups, corporates, governments, academia, and inventors to create new innovations at lightning speed by designing acceleration and venture building programmes that leverage our ecosystem to help them grow faster.


With presence in Shanghai, Shenzhen, Tokyo, Eindhoven and Singapore, XNode is the leading platform for global innovation. 


In China, we have deep roots in the innovation ecosystem to help global MNCs innovate. In Netherlands, we build deep-tech ventures out of technologies from world-class research institutions including TNO, CERN, European Space Agency and many others. In Singapore, we're a partner of Global Innovation Alliance, a joint initiative between Enterprise Singapore and Economic Development Board, to facilitate startups' entry into China’s ecosystem and vice-versa.
postedCompany.name: XNODE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
